duckdb.label: DuckDB focus
duckdb.plan_line: DuckDB for local analytical queries over files and embedded databases.
duckdb.base_notes: Query a local DuckDB database or files (CSV/Parquet) via the MotherDuck MCP server, opened read-only. Discover objects live (SHOW TABLES / DESCRIBE) before querying — do not assume a schema. SELECT-only: the database is opened without --read-write. Good for ad-hoc analysis of exports without standing up a warehouse.
